name: Mushroom Chocolate Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until fluffy.
2. Add egg, vanilla, and almond extract; beat thoroughly.
3. Stir in chocolate.
4. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt, then add to the creamed mixture alternately with sour cream. Mix well.
5. Add remaining ingredients.
6. Drop batter by teaspoonfuls at least 2 inches apart onto a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 12 minutes or until set.
8. Remove from pan and cool.
Note: I omitted the cherries as I prefer not to use candied fruits in my baking, but those who tried these cookies found them great. It was noted that mushrooms were the secret ingredient without being revealed.
